introSection: Wildcat was a steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Schwarzkopf previously located at Pirate's World in Dania, Florida, USA. It operated at Palisades Amusement Park in Cliffside Park, New Jersey, USA prior to its time at Pirate's World.
fullText: Wildcat was a steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Schwarzkopf previously located at Pirate's World in Dania, Florida, USA. It operated at Palisades Amusement Park in Cliffside Park, New Jersey, USA prior to its time at Pirate's World.
